overview.whyItMatters: You can't optimize what you don't measure. GenAI systems need specialized monitoring beyond traditional application metrics. Token usage, output quality, hallucination rates, and prompt effectiveness all require tracking. Good monitoring enables optimization and catches issues before users do.

concepts.title: GenAI Observability Foundations
concepts.content:
Observability for GenAI includes traditional metrics (latency, errors) plus GenAI-specific metrics (tokens, quality, effectiveness).

**CloudWatch for Operational Metrics:**
Standard operational metrics apply: latency percentiles, error rates, throughput. CloudWatch collects Bedrock and SageMaker metrics automatically. Build dashboards for real-time visibility.

**X-Ray for Distributed Tracing:**
Trace requests end-to-end. See time spent in each component: API Gateway, Lambda, Bedrock, Knowledge Base retrieval, post-processing. Identify bottlenecks and slow components.

**FM Interaction Tracing:**
Beyond X-Ray, trace the FM interaction specifically. Log prompts, responses, parameters, and timing. This application-level logging complements infrastructure-level X-Ray traces.

**Bedrock Model Invocation Logs:**
Enable invocation logging to capture detailed request/response information. Log to S3 or CloudWatch. Essential for debugging, quality analysis, and compliance auditing.
keyPoints: CloudWatch for operational metrics (latency, errors, throughput)
X-Ray for distributed tracing across services
Bedrock invocation logs for detailed FM interaction tracking
Combine infrastructure and application-level observability

concepts.title: GenAI-Specific Monitoring
concepts.content:
GenAI applications have unique metrics that traditional monitoring doesn't capture.

**Token Usage Tracking:**
Input and output tokens per request. Aggregate by application, feature, user segment. Track trends over time. Token usage directly correlates with cost.

**Prompt Effectiveness:**
Measure how well prompts achieve their goals. Success rates, user satisfaction signals, task completion. A/B test prompt variants and track which performs better.

**Hallucination Rates:**
Track when outputs contain incorrect or unsupported claims. Manual labeling, user feedback, or automated fact-checking. High hallucination rates indicate problems with prompts, retrieval, or grounding.

**Response Quality:**
Quality is subjective but measurable. User ratings, thumbs up/down, corrections. NLG metrics like fluency, coherence, relevance. Quality trends indicate prompt or model degradation.

**Anomaly Detection:**
Detect unusual patterns: sudden latency spikes, error rate changes, token usage anomalies, quality drops. CloudWatch anomaly detection or custom algorithms. Early warning for issues.
keyPoints: Track tokens by application/feature/user
Measure prompt effectiveness through A/B testing
Monitor hallucination and quality rates
Anomaly detection for early warning

concepts.title: Integrated Monitoring Dashboards
concepts.content:
Bring metrics together in dashboards that tell a complete story.

**Operational Dashboards:**
Real-time system health: latency, errors, throughput, availability. For on-call engineers and operations teams. Alert when SLAs are at risk.

**Business Impact Dashboards:**
Connect GenAI metrics to business outcomes. Cost per conversation, customer satisfaction impact, task automation rates. For leadership and product teams.

**Compliance Dashboards:**
Track compliance-relevant metrics. Guardrail trigger rates, PII detection frequency, audit log completeness. For governance and compliance teams.

**Audit Logging Integration:**
CloudTrail provides API-level audit logs. Combine with application logs for complete picture. Who did what, when, with what result. Essential for investigations.

**Custom Metrics:**
Publish custom CloudWatch metrics for GenAI-specific measurements. Token counts, quality scores, prompt versions. Use dimensions to slice by meaningful categories.
keyPoints: Operational dashboards for system health
Business dashboards for impact and ROI
Compliance dashboards for governance teams
Custom metrics for GenAI-specific measurements

concepts.title: Tool and Agent Observability
concepts.content:
Agentic systems require specialized monitoring for tool calls and multi-agent coordination.

**Tool Call Tracking:**
Log every tool invocation: which tool, what parameters, success/failure, latency. Understand tool usage patterns. Identify problematic tools (high failure, slow response).

**Multi-Agent Coordination:**
For multi-agent systems, track agent handoffs and coordination. Which agents were involved, what was delegated, how did they coordinate. Visualize agent interaction patterns.

**Usage Baselines:**
Establish normal patterns for tool usage. Alert when patterns deviate. Sudden increase in tool calls might indicate agent confusion. Sudden decrease might indicate broken tools.

**X-Ray for Tool Calls:**
Extend X-Ray traces to include tool calls. See tool latency as part of the overall request trace. Identify whether tools or FM inference dominate latency.
keyPoints: Log all tool invocations with parameters and outcomes
Track multi-agent coordination and handoffs
Establish usage baselines and alert on deviation
Include tool calls in X-Ray traces

concepts.title: Monitoring for Troubleshooting
concepts.content:
Good monitoring enables efficient troubleshooting when issues arise.

**Golden Datasets:**
Maintain test queries with known-good responses. Run periodically and compare outputs. Quality regression is immediately visible. Essential for detecting hallucination drift.

**Output Diffing:**
Compare outputs across model versions, prompt changes, or time periods. Highlight differences. Understand how changes affect output quality and characteristics.

**Reasoning Path Tracing:**
For chain-of-thought or agent systems, trace the reasoning path. Log intermediate steps. When outputs are wrong, trace back to identify where reasoning went astray.

**Vector Store Monitoring:**
Monitor vector database health. Index size, query latency, storage utilization. Embedding quality metrics. Data freshness indicators. Vector store problems cause retrieval failures.
keyPoints: Golden datasets detect quality regression
Output diffing shows impact of changes
Reasoning traces diagnose logic issues
Vector store monitoring prevents retrieval failures

skillExplanations.explanation:
Observability combines metrics, traces, and logs for complete system visibility. CloudWatch provides metrics for Bedrock and SageMaker automatically. X-Ray traces requests across services.

FM interaction tracing logs application-level details that infrastructure monitoring misses. Prompt contents, response details, parameter settings. Enable Bedrock invocation logging for comprehensive capture.

awsServices.whenToUse: Metrics, dashboards, alarms for operational monitoring.

skillExplanations.explanation:
GenAI-specific monitoring captures what traditional metrics miss. Token usage tracking enables cost management. Prompt effectiveness measurement drives optimization. Hallucination rate monitoring catches quality issues.

Anomaly detection provides early warning. CloudWatch anomaly detection learns normal patterns and alerts on deviation. Configure for metrics where anomalies indicate problems.

awsServices.whenToUse: Custom metrics for tokens, quality, effectiveness. Anomaly detection.
Invocation logs for detailed FM interaction data.

skillExplanations.explanation:
Integrated dashboards present metrics for different audiences. Operational dashboards for engineers show system health. Business dashboards for leadership show impact and ROI. Compliance dashboards for governance show policy adherence.

CloudWatch Dashboards combine metrics from multiple sources. CloudTrail provides audit logging. Combine for complete operational and compliance visibility.

awsServices.whenToUse: Dashboards combining metrics for different audiences.
Audit logging for compliance and investigation.

skillExplanations.explanation:
Tool and agent observability tracks autonomous system behavior. Log tool invocations with outcomes. Track multi-agent coordination patterns. Establish baselines and alert on deviation.

X-Ray traces should include tool calls. See how tool latency contributes to overall request time. Identify problematic tools causing performance issues.

awsServices.whenToUse: Custom metrics for tool usage patterns and baselines.
Include tool calls in distributed traces.

skillExplanations.explanation:
Vector store monitoring prevents retrieval failures. Track query latency, index health, storage utilization. Monitor embedding quality through relevance metrics.

Automated index optimization keeps performance stable. OpenSearch index management policies handle maintenance. Monitor for index growth and performance degradation.

awsServices.whenToUse: Vector store monitoring. Index health and performance.
Metrics for retrieval performance and quality.

skillExplanations.explanation:
Troubleshooting support through monitoring enables efficient incident response. Golden datasets with expected outputs detect regression. Output diffing shows impact of changes.

Reasoning path tracing for agents and chain-of-thought shows where logic went wrong. Bedrock Model Evaluations can run systematic quality checks on golden datasets.

awsServices.whenToUse: Systematic quality testing against golden datasets.
Log queries for reasoning trace analysis.

examStrategies.approach: X-Ray for end-to-end request tracing. Visualize time spent in each component. Identify slow services or operations.
Custom CloudWatch metrics for tokens, quality, hallucination rates. Bedrock invocation logs for detailed interaction data.
Golden datasets with Bedrock Model Evaluations. Output diffing. Anomaly detection on quality metrics.

keyTakeaways: CloudWatch for metrics, X-Ray for traces, invocation logs for details
Track GenAI-specific metrics: tokens, quality, hallucination rates
Different dashboards for different audiences (ops, business, compliance)
Monitor tool calls and agent coordination in agentic systems
commonMistakes: Only monitoring infrastructure, not GenAI-specific metrics
No golden datasets for quality regression detection
Not enabling Bedrock invocation logs (missing detailed interaction data)
No anomaly detection for early warning of issues
